sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Q3e_LS4_U01_04_ListeningSkill_ActivityA

sentences.audio: audio_chunks/Q3e_LS4_U01_04_ListeningSkill_ActivityA.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: For most people
sentences.arabic: لأغلب الناس
sentences.audio: audio_chunks/For most people.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: business meetings are boring
sentences.arabic: اجتماعات العمل مملة
sentences.audio: audio_chunks/business meetings are boring.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: but they don’t have to be that way
sentences.arabic: لكن لا يجب أن تكون كذلك
sentences.audio: audio_chunks/but they don’t have to be that way.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Today I’m going to give you a few tips on how to run an effective business meeting
sentences.arabic: اليوم سأعطيكم بعض النصائح حول كيفية إجراء اجتماعات عمل فعالة
sentences.audio: audio_chunks/Today I’m going to give you a few tips on how to run an effective business meeting.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Although not every tip might work for you
sentences.arabic: رغم أن بعض النصائح قد لا تعمل معك
sentences.audio: audio_chunks/Although not every tip might work for you.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: meetings don’t have to put everyone in the room to sleep.
sentences.arabic: لا يجب أن تجعل اجتماعات العمل الجميع ينام في الغرفة.
sentences.audio: audio_chunks/meetings don’t have to put everyone in the room to sleep.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: There are many job-finding tools available online.
sentences.arabic: هناك العديد من الأدوات المتاحة عبر الإنترنت لبحث الوظائف
sentences.audio: audio_chunks/There are many job-finding tools available online.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: For instance
sentences.arabic: على سبيل المثال
sentences.audio: audio_chunks/For instance.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: some websites tell job searchers about positions that are available
sentences.arabic: بعض المواقع الإلكترونية تخبر بحثي الوظائف عن الوظائف المتاحة
sentences.audio: audio_chunks/Although not every tip might work for you.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: while others give tips on writing a résumé or answering questions in a job interview
sentences.arabic: بينما توفر أخرى نصائح حول كتابة السيرة الذاتية أو الإجابة على الأسئلة في مقابلة العمل
sentences.audio: audio_chunks/while others give tips on writing a résumé or answering questions in a job interview.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Today, I’d like to focus on how to make the best use of these online tools
sentences.arabic: اليوم، أود أن أركز على كيفية الاستفادة القصوى من هذه الأدوات الإلكترونية
sentences.audio: audio_chunks/Today, I’d like to focus on how to make the best use of these online tools.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Online job resources are valuable
sentences.arabic: موارد العمل عبر الإنترنت قيمة
sentences.audio: audio_chunks/Online job resources are valuable.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: but they won’t help us much if we don’t know the best ways to use them to hire
sentences.arabic: لكنهم لن يساعدونا كثيراً إذا لم نكن نعرف أفضل الطرق لاستخدامهم في التوظيف

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Hiring the right employees can be a real challenge
sentences.arabic: توظيف الموظفين المناسبين يمكن أن يكون تحدياً حقيقياً
sentences.audio: audio_chunks/Hiring the right employees can be a real challenge.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Many managers add a new person to their staff who is not a good choice.
sentences.arabic: العديد من المديرين يضيفون شخصاً جديداً إلى فريقهم الذي ليس خياراً جيداً.
sentences.audio: audio_chunks/Many managers add a new person to their staff who is not a good choice.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: Let’s consider some techniques to evaluate potential employees
sentences.arabic: لنفكر في بعض التقنيات لتقييم الموظفين المحتملين
sentences.audio: audio_chunks/Let’s consider some techniques to evaluate potential employees.mp3

sentences.speaker: Narrator:
sentences.english: and explore ways to successfully pick the best people to hire.
sentences.arabic: ولنستكشف طرقاً لاختيار أفضل الأشخاص للتوظيف بنجاح.
sentences.audio: audio_chunks/and explore ways to successfully pick the best people to hire.mp3
